parameters.jsCode:
const input = (items[0] && items[0].json) ? items[0].json : {};
const now = new Date();
const stamp = now.toISOString().replace(/[-:.TZ]/g, '').slice(0, 14);
const executionId = ($execution && $execution.id) ? String($execution.id) : 'manual';
const runId = 'run-' + executionId + '-' + stamp;

const context = {
  run_id: runId,
  execution_id: executionId,
  created_at: now.toISOString(),
  completed_at: null,
  status: 'running',

  model_primary: input.model || $env.OLLAMA_MODEL || 'qwen3.5:27b',
  model_used: input.model || $env.OLLAMA_MODEL || 'qwen3.5:27b',

  topic_hint: input.topic || '',

  workflow_dir: input.workflow_dir || $env.OBSIDIAN_WORKFLOW_DIR || 'Marketing/Social-Media/Workflow',
  workflow_logs_dir: input.workflow_logs_dir || $env.OBSIDIAN_WORKFLOW_LOGS_DIR || 'Marketing/Social-Media/Workflow/Workflow Logs',
  workflow_results_dir: input.workflow_results_dir || $env.OBSIDIAN_WORKFLOW_RESULTS_DIR || 'Marketing/Social-Media/Workflow/Workflow Ergebnisse',
  workflow_drafts_dir: input.workflow_drafts_dir || $env.OBSIDIAN_WORKFLOW_DRAFTS_DIR || 'Marketing/Social-Media/Workflow/Drafts',
  workflow_prompts_dir: input.workflow_prompts_dir || $env.OBSIDIAN_WORKFLOW_PROMPTS_DIR || 'Marketing/Social-Media/Workflow/Prompts',

  workflow_results_index: input.workflow_results_index || $env.OBSIDIAN_WORKFLOW_RESULTS_INDEX || 'Marketing/Social-Media/Workflow/Workflow Ergebnisse/00-Workflow-Ergebnisse.md',
  workflow_steps_file: input.workflow_steps_file || $env.OBSIDIAN_WORKFLOW_STEPS_FILE || 'Marketing/Social-Media/Workflow/Workflow Schritte.md',
  workflow_intermediate_file: input.workflow_intermediate_file || $env.OBSIDIAN_WORKFLOW_INTERMEDIATE_FILE || 'Marketing/Social-Media/Workflow/Workflow Zwischenergebnisse.md',
  workflow_overview_file: input.workflow_overview_file || $env.OBSIDIAN_WORKFLOW_OVERVIEW_FILE || 'Marketing/Social-Media/Workflow/Workflow Übersicht.md',

  obsidian_rest_url: $env.OBSIDIAN_REST_URL || '',
  obsidian_rest_api_key: $env.OBSIDIAN_REST_API_KEY || '',
  allow_insecure_tls: String($env.OBSIDIAN_ALLOW_INSECURE_TLS || 'true').toLowerCase() === 'true',

  prompts: {},
  stage_logs: [],
  stage_summaries: [],
  artifacts: {},

  output_paths: {},
};

return [{ json: context }];

return [{
  json: {
    run_id: $json.run_id,
    execution_id: $json.execution_id,
    status: $json.status,
    topic: $json.topic,
    model_used: $json.model_used,
    workflow_log_path: $json.output_paths.workflow_log,
    linkedin_research_path: $json.output_paths.linkedin_research,
    reddit_research_path: $json.output_paths.reddit_research,
    linkedin_draft_path: $json.output_paths.linkedin_draft,
    reddit_draft_path: $json.output_paths.reddit_draft,
    workflow_results_index: $json.workflow_results_index,
    workflow_intermediate_file: $json.workflow_intermediate_file,
    workflow_steps_file: $json.workflow_steps_file,
    workflow_overview_file: $json.workflow_overview_file,
  },
}];
